temperature.evidence: Nahi madam abhi toh nahi dekh raha abhi toh isi plan mein mujhe doubt ho gaya hai ki agar main invest karunga toh fir baad mein koi problem hoga.

objections.quote: Nahi madam abhi toh nahi dekh raha abhi toh isi plan mein mujhe doubt ho gaya hai ki agar main invest karunga toh fir baad mein koi problem hoga.

customer_pain_points: lower than expected returns on existing policy

investment_sophistication.evidence: Woh toh bond paper madam kya hota hai ki aadmi humare paas itna busy hai ki humein nahi hota na time itna dekhne ka

decision_maker_status.evidence: maine policy karai thi 1 lakh rupaye ki

agent_promises: 36% income from first year for lifetime

product_fit.mismatch_reason: Customer is currently dissatisfied with the brand due to a previous mis-selling experience.

approachability.reasoning: Customer is actively dissatisfied with a previous HDFC Life policy and explicitly stated he is not looking for new investments due to this bad experience.

call_narrative.opening_hook: Agent called to pitch a guaranteed income product, but the conversation immediately shifted to the customer's existing policy grievance.
call_narrative.customer_response: Customer was initially passive but became defensive and frustrated when discussing his previous bad experience with an HDFC Life policy.
call_narrative.key_event: Customer raised a grievance about his existing 'Click to achieve' policy returns not matching the promised 50%.
call_narrative.ending: Customer politely declined further interest, citing his current dissatisfaction with his existing policy.

key_quotes: 1 lakh mein. Next year ussi saal. Toh first year toh wapis aa gaya 50,000. Second year paisa hi nahi aaye madam, 23,000 aaye.
Nahi madam abhi toh nahi dekh raha abhi toh isi plan mein mujhe doubt ho gaya hai ki agar main invest karunga toh fir baad mein koi problem hoga.
